chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4099 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.18904/2023. 2. For orders on Misc. No.18905/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 05.09.2023. Petitioner is present in person. ------ YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner seeks that directions be issued to the Secretary, Health Department, Government of Sindh and its other functionaries for ensuring proper functioning of BHU and UHC at Patel Para, District East, Karachi. However, the averments advanced through the Petition are vague and general, and even if the same are taken at face value, at best constitute allegations of maladministration, for which the appropriate forum is the Provincial Ombudsman. That being so, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the same in limine, along with the other miscellaneous applications, leaving the Petitioner to avail such remedy, if so desired. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
